items.en: The meat should be fried on low heat.
Chop the vegetables finely.
Knead the dough until it is soft.
Add spices to season the dish.
Wait until the soup boils.
The bread needs to be baked in the oven.
Steaming food is healthier.
Add the meat after the oil has heated up.
It is important to add salt in the right amount.
Serve the finished dish while hot.
He felt as if he had lost all hope.
I couldn't hide my embarrassment.
Regret was noticeable on his face.
I was so anxious that I couldn't speak aloud.

I began to feel suspicion.
Contentment showed in his eyes.

His heart ached with longing.

items.kk: Той дайындығы бірнеше ай бұрын басталды.
items.en: Wedding preparations began several months in advance.
The bride wore a white dress.
The groom came to take the bride.
The marriage ceremony took place solemnly.
The guests congratulated the young couple.
There was traditional music and dance at the wedding.
The parents gave their blessing to their children.
The table was full of various dishes.
Happiness was wished to the new family.
The wedding night lasted a long time.
